de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.impl

Class AbstractSymbolicAssociationValueContainer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.impl.AbstractElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.impl.AbstractSymbolicAssociationValueContainer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer, ISymbolicElement
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    SymbolicObject, SymbolicState

    public abstract class AbstractSymbolicAssociationValueContainer
extends AbstractElement
implements ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer
    Default implementation of ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer.

      • getAssociations

        public ImmutableList<ISymbolicAssociation> getAssociations()
        Returns the contained associations.
        Specified by:
        getAssociations in interface ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer

      • addAssociation

        public void addAssociation(ISymbolicAssociation association)
        Adds a new ISymbolicAssociation.

        value - The new ISymbolicAssociation to add.

      • getAssociation

        public ISymbolicAssociation getAssociation(IProgramVariable programVariable,
                                           boolean isArrayIndex,
                                           Term arrayIndex,
                                           Term condition)
        Returns the ISymbolicAssociation with the given IProgramVariable.
        Specified by:
        getAssociation in interface ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer
        Parameters:
        programVariable - The IProgramVariable for which the ISymbolicAssociation is requested.
        isArrayIndex - Is array index?
        arrayIndex - The array index.
        condition - The optional condition under which this association is valid.
        Returns:
        The found ISymbolicAssociation or null if no ISymbolicAssociation is available with the given IProgramVariable.

      • getValues

        public ImmutableList<ISymbolicValue> getValues()
        Returns the contained values.
        Specified by:
        getValues in interface ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer
        Returns:
        The contained values.

        public void addValue(ISymbolicValue value)

      • getValue

        public ISymbolicValue getValue(IProgramVariable programVariable,
                               boolean isArrayIndex,
                               Term arrayIndex,
                               Term condition)
        Returns the ISymbolicValue with the given IProgramVariable.
        Specified by:
        getValue in interface ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer
        Parameters:
        programVariable - The IProgramVariable for which the ISymbolicValue is requested.
        isArrayIndex - Is array index?
        arrayIndex - The array index.
        condition - The optional condition under which this value is valid.
        Returns:
        The found ISymbolicValue or null if no ISymbolicValue is available with the given IProgramVariable.
